mango-auth
==========

# Available modules


The overview below shows which mango-auth installations are available per HPC-UGent Tier-2 cluster, ordered based on software version (new to old).

To start using mango-auth, load one of these modules using a `module load` command like:

```shell
module load mango-auth/0.0.11-GCCcore-14.2.0
```

*(This data was automatically generated on {{modules_last_updated}})*
